english translation text: Ziyarat-e-Jamia Sagheer

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى أَوْلِيَاءِ اللَّهِ وَ أَصْفِيَائِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on the sincere adherents of Allah, who are also His exceptional favourites,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى أُمَنَاءِ اللَّهِ وَ أَحِبَّائِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on the trustees of Allah, who are also His dearest friends,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى أَنْصَارِ اللَّهِ وَ خُلَفَائِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on the supporters of Allah, who are also His representatives,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى مَحَالِّ مَعْرِفَةِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on the medium of the awareness of Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى مَسَاكِنِ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on the centre of the remembrance of Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى مُظْهِرِي أَمْرِ اللَّهِ وَ نَهْيِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) who make clear His lawful and unlawful,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الدُّعَاةِ إِلَى اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) who invite mankind unto Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الْمُسْتَقِرِّينَ فِي مَرْضَاةِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) who occupy and supervise the centre through which Allah's pleasure is routed,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الْمُخْلِصِينَ فِي طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) who truly obey and serve Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الْأَدِلاَّءِ عَلَى اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) who show the right path leading unto Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مَنْ وَالاَهُمْ فَقَدْ وَالَى اللَّهَ
english translation text: Peace be on (you) whom whoever befriends, in fact, makes friends with Allah,

arabic text: وَ مَنْ عَادَاهُمْ فَقَدْ عَادَى اللَّهَ
english translation text: Whom whosoever opposes, in fact, runs counter to Allah,

arabic text: وَ مَنْ عَرَفَهُمْ فَقَدْ عَرَفَ اللَّهَ
english translation text: Whom whosoever understands, in fact, recognizes Allah,

arabic text: وَ مَنْ جَهِلَهُمْ فَقَدْ جَهِلَ اللَّهَ
english translation text: Whom whosoever passes over, in fact, ignores Allah,

arabic text: وَ مَنِ اعْتَصَمَ بِهِمْ فَقَدِ اعْتَصَمَ بِاللَّهِ
english translation text: Whom whosoever defends, in fact, supports Allah,

arabic text: وَ مَنْ تَخَلَّى مِنْهُمْ فَقَدْ تَخَلَّى مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ
english translation text: Whom whoso deserts, in fact, abandons the Almighty Allah.

arabic text: وَ أُشْهِدُ اللَّهَ أَنِّي سِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمْتُمْ
english translation text: I request Allah to vouch for me that I make peace with those who are at peace with you,

arabic text: وَ حَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبْتُمْ
english translation text: Make war upon those who declare war on you,

arabic text: مُؤْمِنٌ بِسِرِّكُمْ وَ عَلاَنِيَتِكُمْ
english translation text: I believe in that which is concealed and in that which is evident concerning you,

arabic text: مُفَوِّضٌ فِي ذَلِكَ كُلِّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ
english translation text: I give total control of my affairs in your hands.

arabic text: لَعَنَ اللَّهُ عَدُوَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ
english translation text: May Allah curse the enemies of the household of Muhammad, be they jinn or men,

arabic text: وَ أَبْرَأُ إِلَى اللَّهِ مِنْهُمْ
english translation text: I disconnect all links with them and turn to Allah,

arabic text: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِه
english translation text: Allah's blessings be on Muhammad and on his children.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
